ROOT CAUSE of the residual 5: a PLATFORM-side AI-readiness response-build perf wall — GET /api/workforce/ai-readiness NEVER completes in-budget at 200 members (0 backend completions; ai_readiness_refresh worker deadline-exceeded), every AI-readiness SQL query EXPLAINs at ms (not index-bound), the cause is the live-recompute + a per-skill federated translation N+1 (withSkillerLang -> skiller _entities), same class as the M46 per-object Sentinel RPC. USER-BLOCKER: the gate cannot reach (0,0) without a platform-read-path edit (forbidden by the invariant), a substantial NEW app-translation/snapshot-short-circuit demo-patch, OR a disclosed-residual sign-off (slow-but-correct, data proven in DB) — surfaced for the user's decision.
